center.name: 濟州特別自治道
center.summary: 濟州特別自治道是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑脸琵鹭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Wintering also occurs in Jeju, South Korea, Kyushu and Okinawa, Japan, and the Red River delta in Vietnam

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Wintering also occurs in Jeju, South Korea, Kyushu and Okinawa, Japan, and the Red River delta in Vietnam
